caption: The video features a man sitting in a radio studio, engaged in what appears to be a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" printed on it, a white cap, and headphones. The man is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is either hosting or participating in the show. Behind him, there is a banner with the text "Unique Hustle" and stars, along with another sign that reads "Where Bosses Talk!" The setting includes various pieces of equipment typical of a radio or podcast studio, such as a laptop and a mug on the desk. The man seems to be listening intently, possibly to a guest or co-host, indicating an interactive and engaging conversation.
